name: Group Stage Finale: France Make a Statement
angle: The 2026 group stage reaches its climax: Ousmane Dembele's first-half hat-trick sends France past Norway 4-1 to top Group I, while the last knockout places fall into place across a frantic final round.

questions.question: France beat Norway 4-1 in Boston to finish their group with three wins from three. Who scored a first-half hat-trick?
Norway rotated heavily and left one striker on the bench against France, despite the crowd chanting his name. Who was it?
Their win over Norway confirmed France as winners of which group?
Norway were handed a second-half penalty against France but spurned it, the spot-kick saved by goalkeeper Mike Maignan. Who took the miss?
Who scored Norway's only goal against France, briefly pulling it back to 2-1?
Dembele arrived at the World Cup as the reigning Ballon d'Or holder. In which year had he won the award?
Belgium hammered New Zealand 5-1 to win their group. Which veteran playmaker was among the scorers?
Belgium's rout took top spot in Group G on goal difference. Which side went through as runners-up?
Iran thought they had snatched a stoppage-time winner against Egypt, only for the goal to be chalked off after a VAR review. Why?

options.D: The ball had gone out of play

questions.question: Spain edged top spot in Group H with a 1-0 win over which South American side?
Tournament debutants Cape Verde reached the knockout stage as Group H runners-up after a goalless draw with whom?
Senegal signed off the group stage in style with a 5-0 demolition of which side in Group I?
Group D winners the United States begin their round-of-32 campaign in Santa Clara against which nation?
Group F runners-up Japan drew a fearsome round-of-32 tie. Which five-time world champions await them?
In the new 48-team format, the top two from all 12 groups go through, joined by a set number of the best third-placed teams. How many third-placed sides advance to the round of 32?

sources: https://www.nbcsports.com/soccer/live/norway-vs-france-live-updates-score-goals-highlights-stats-2026-fifa-world-cup-june-26 (France 4-1 Norway: Dembele first-half hat-trick, Mbappe two assists, Doue late header; Aasgaard scored for Norway; Strand Larsen penalty saved by Maignan; Haaland benched; Gillette Stadium, Boston)
https://www.espn.com/soccer/story/_/id/49162214/world-cup-live-updates-france-takes-norway-decide-group-i (France top Group I after Dembele first-half hat-trick; Haaland on the bench; Foxborough)

https://sports.yahoo.com/soccer/live/world-cup-schedule-scores-live-updates-results-group-g-group-h-group-i-160927428.html (Jun 26 results: Belgium 5-1 New Zealand with De Bruyne among scorers, Belgium top Group G on goal difference, Egypt runners-up; Egypt 1-1 Iran with Iran stoppage-time winner ruled offside by VAR; Spain 1-0 Uruguay tops Group H; Cape Verde 0-0 Saudi Arabia finish second; Senegal 5-0 Iraq)
https://www.aljazeera.com/sports/2026/6/26/which-teams-have-qualified-for-the-world-cup-2026-knockouts-round-of-32 (Confirmed group winners and qualifiers; Cape Verde reach knockouts on debut)

https://www.espn.com/soccer/story/_/id/48939282/2026-fifa-world-cup-fixtures-results-match-schedule-group-stage-knockout-rounds-bracket (Round of 32 schedule: USA v Bosnia and Herzegovina July 1 Santa Clara; Japan v Brazil)
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/2026_FIFA_World_Cup (48 teams, 12 groups; top two plus eight best third-placed teams advance to the round of 32)
